title: Hen Party Decoration, Rose Gold Hen Do Decorations Hen Do Party Accessories with 1 Bride to Be Balloons, 2 Garland, 22 Latex Hen Party Balloons, 2 Foil Balloons for Bride To Be Decorations
features: 💗💗💗【Package Contains】：The hen do decorations supplies include 1 x BRIDE TO BE letter foil balloons，1 x triangle flag banner，1 x star banner, 6 x rose gold latex hen party balloons, 6 x latex hen party balloons with inner confetti, 10 x white latex balloons and 2 x heart shape foil balloons for hen do hen party decoration.

💗💗💗【Size Of Bride To Be Decorations】: The bride to be balloons letter are 16 inches, all the latex balloons are 12 inches, heart shape foil balloons are 18 inches, The size of each triangle of the triangular flag banner is 18×13cm and star banner: the size of big stars are 13cm, the small stars are 6cm. They are good for hen party decorations.

💗💗💗【Eye-Catching Hen Party Decoration】: The overall color of this set of bridal shower decorations is rose gold, in addition to bride to be decorations balloon, there are 2 rose gold banners and balloons that can be hung, you can hang them anywhere in the room, the whole room is sparkling , full of romance.
💗💗💗【Premium Quality】: The balloons are all made of latex material, which is safe and non-toxic, and the banners are cardboard, which are neatly hung and will not wrinkle.

💗💗💗【Easy To Assemble】:The banners all have ribbons, just pass the ribbons through the 2 holes on the card, the balloons have ribbons, which can be used to tie the balloons, and the Bride to be balloon have a straw, which can be used to inflate, and can be directly pasted without ribbon.

specifications_table.Occasion: ‎Bride To Be Decoration, Hen Decorations, Hen Do Decorations, Hen Party Decoration
